changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.comment: search_metadata_scoped_384: chunks_384 ⋈ manifest ⋈ catalog_documents, metadata-filtered, vector-ranked
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_metadata_scoped_384( p_query vector(384), p_collections text[], p_content_type text, p_author text, p_year int, p_corpus text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_384 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_content_type IS NULL OR d.content_type = p_content_type) AND (p_author IS NULL OR d.author = p_author) AND (p_year IS NULL OR d.year = p_year) AND (p_corpus IS NULL OR d.corpus = p_corpus) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_metadata_scoped_384(vector, text[], text, text, int, text, int)

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_metadata_scoped_768( p_query vector(768), p_collections text[], p_content_type text, p_author text, p_year int, p_corpus text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_768 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_content_type IS NULL OR d.content_type = p_content_type) AND (p_author IS NULL OR d.author = p_author) AND (p_year IS NULL OR d.year = p_year) AND (p_corpus IS NULL OR d.corpus = p_corpus) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_metadata_scoped_768(vector, text[], text, text, int, text, int)

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_metadata_scoped_1024( p_query vector(1024), p_collections text[], p_content_type text, p_author text, p_year int, p_corpus text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_content_type IS NULL OR d.content_type = p_content_type) AND (p_author IS NULL OR d.author = p_author) AND (p_year IS NULL OR d.year = p_year) AND (p_corpus IS NULL OR d.corpus = p_corpus) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_metadata_scoped_1024(vector, text[], text, text, int, text, int)

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.comment: search_topic_scoped_384: chunks_384 ⋈ manifest ⋈ catalog_documents ⋈ topic_assignments ⋈ topics
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_topic_scoped_384( p_query vector(384), p_topic_label text, p_collection text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_384 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN nexus.topic_assignments ta ON ta.tenant_id = d.tenant_id AND ta.doc_id = d.tumbler JOIN nexus.topics t ON t.tenant_id = ta.tenant_id AND t.id = ta.topic_id WHERE c.collection = p_collection AND t.collection = p_collection AND t.label = p_topic_label AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_topic_scoped_384(vector, text, text, int)

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_topic_scoped_768( p_query vector(768), p_topic_label text, p_collection text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_768 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN nexus.topic_assignments ta ON ta.tenant_id = d.tenant_id AND ta.doc_id = d.tumbler JOIN nexus.topics t ON t.tenant_id = ta.tenant_id AND t.id = ta.topic_id WHERE c.collection = p_collection AND t.collection = p_collection AND t.label = p_topic_label AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_topic_scoped_768(vector, text, text, int)

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.15
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_topic_scoped_1024( p_query vector(1024), p_topic_label text, p_collection text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8 FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN nexus.topic_assignments ta ON ta.tenant_id = d.tenant_id AND ta.doc_id = d.tumbler JOIN nexus.topics t ON t.tenant_id = ta.tenant_id AND t.id = ta.topic_id WHERE c.collection = p_collection AND t.collection = p_collection AND t.label = p_topic_label AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_topic_scoped_1024(vector, text, text, int)
